events.text: RECALL -- Slime Boss, layer:heuristics, bosses/Slime Boss

events.reasoning: To map
Boss: Slime Boss

FIGHT STRATEGY — Slime Boss (150 HP, A9). TYPE: Boss — spend HP for speed. WIN CON: damage on free turns (Goop/Preparing), hold above split threshold 75 until a Slam turn, then burst under — split replaces Slam (free dodge) and both spawns inherit the low HP. Thunderclap = AOE Vuln post-split; spread damage, don't kill one early. KEY: Spot Weakness only works on Slam turns (+3 Str). Slimed cards will clog — Pommel/draw mitigates. POTIONS: Fear (Vuln 2) on burst; Colorless flexible. RISKS: Slam 35; 3-enemy board if I kill a large slime early. WIN%: 42% (+2) WHY: full prep checklist except exhaust tools; 78/80 HP entry.

events.text: RECALL -- Bronze Automaton, layer:heuristics, bosses/Bronze Automaton

events.reasoning: BOSS PLAN — Bronze Automaton (320 HP A9, Artifact 3, 2 Orbs w/Stasis). Phases: strip Artifact w/TC+Bash+/Uppercut (non-exhausting), then Vuln burst; Whirlwind AOE handles orbs. Hyper Beam ~58 on its turn 6 — Incense Burner [0] grants Intangible exactly turn 6 if cycle holds; Impervious 30 + Defends as backup. Blood Potion (17) + Dex Potion held for beam window. WIN%: 50% (+2) WHY: entering at 61/85 with beam answers stacked; Stasis variance is the main risk.
